title: Casando a mi Ex
overview: Mariana believes that weddings are a farce, so she dedicates herself to planning them. When Luis, her boyfriend, proposes to her, she refuses to fall into the business that she despises so much. To pretend that her breakup didn't hurt her, she decides to organize the wedding of her now-ex. What Mariana doesn't know is that the reason why Luis marries her is to take revenge on her.
